_meta.name: philosophical-no-topic
_meta.scenario: An AI summarization model returns an empty topic array — e.g., for abstract philosophical content where no discrete topics could be extracted. normalizeTopics([], []) returns [] and resolveAndPersistEpisodeTopics early-exits (in resolveAndPersistEpisodeTopics's empty-topics guard) before calling generateEmbeddings or transactional(). No canonical inserts occur.
_meta.expectedOutcome: normalizeTopics returns []; resolveAndPersistEpisodeTopics returns {topicCount: 0, resolved: 0, failed: 0}; txCallLog is empty (no transactional() invocations).
